name: FLOW_01_INITIAL_INQUIRY
description: First contact flow - qualifies lead intent

nodes.content:
🏝️ Welcome to Panglao Prime Villas!

Thank you for your interest. I'm here to answer your questions about our 2 luxury villas in Bohol.

What brings you here today?

💰 Investment Overview:

Each villa:
• PHP 32,500,000 purchase price
• PHP 395,000 monthly Airbnb income (verified)
• 17-25% annual ROI
• 263.78 sqm floor area
• Full management included

Ready to discuss terms?

🏠 Site Visit Information:

We offer virtual tours and in-person visits.

Preferred timing?

🏦 Financing Options:

BDO Bank partnership available for qualified buyers.
• Loan-to-value: Up to 70%
• Terms: 15-20 years
• Processing time: 3-5 business days

Are you a qualified buyer?

❓ Common Questions:

1. How far is the beach? (60 seconds walk)
2. Management included? (Yes, full Airbnb management)
3. Occupancy rate? (65% average, 49% market average)
4. Reserve requirement? (PHP 200,000)

What else would you like to know?

Perfect! To help you best, could you share:

1. Your name?
2. Your country of residence?
3. Investment timeline? (ASAP / Within 30 days / Exploring)

📋 Full FAQ:

1. What's included in management?
2. Tax implications?
3. Can I use the villa?
4. Renting procedures?
5. Maintenance costs?
6. Exit strategy?
7. Insurance?

Select a number (1-7) to learn more
